scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); if (process.env.SKIP_PRISMA_GENERATE==='1' || !fs.existsSync('./prisma/schema.prisma')) process.exit(0); const cmd=process.platform==='win32' ? 'npx.cmd' : 'npx'; const result=spawnSync(cmd,['prisma','generate','--schema','./prisma/schema.prisma'],{stdio:'inherit', env:process.env}); if (result.error) throw result.error; process.exit(result.status ?? 0);"
